response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned Staff-level engineer with an impressive breadth of experience across various platforms and a proven ability to build complex systems and developer tools from scratch. His background in high-scale microservices and recent work with AI infrastructure are positive signals. However, the resume shows a critical gap: a complete lack of direct experience in the core domain of building experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth platforms. While he is a strong generalist builder, this specialized Principal role requires deep expertise in experimentation systems, which he does not demonstrate.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) as a Staff-level engineer with a strong builder mentality, evidenced by founding a company and creating numerous open-source tools.
Proven ability to work on high-scale, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Broad technical versatility across multiple languages (JS/TS, Dlang, Java, C++) and platforms (web, backend, dev-ops).
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or working on experimentation, A/B testing, or feature flagging platforms, which is the core of the role.
Experience is very broad, lacking the deep specialization in growth engineering and measurement systems required for a Principal-level position in this domain.
Resume focuses on application/tool development rather than architecting foundational, cross-team enabling systems as described in the job description.
